name: memo
description: Save and restore selective, project-local Codex session memos on explicit request.

interface.shortDescription: Selective session checkpoints on explicit request.
interface.longDescription: Memo adds a stable session marker at lifecycle boundaries and an explicitly invoked skill for saving, restoring, and cleaning project-local session checkpoints.
defaultPrompt: Use $memo to save this session's working state.
Use $memo read to restore this session memo.
Use $memo clean to remove this project's memos.
